\tzpentry{ID3825}{Hamiltonian Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3825 introduces Hamiltonian Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \frac{\mathrm{d}q}{\mathrm{d}t} = \frac{\partial H}{\partial p},\qquad \frac{\mathrm{d}p}{\mathrm{d}t} = -\frac{\partial H}{\partial q} + F_{\text{ext}}. \]
